case_title: CHIN, RACHEL L. M.D. VS SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC. DBA PACIFIC BELL TELEPH CO

docket_entries.description: SUBPOENA DUCES TECUM ISSUED TO SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,603.81 FILED BY CHIN, RACHEL L. M.D. AS TO DEFENDANT SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC. DBA PACIFIC BELL TELEPH CO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-24-2002 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIN, RACHEL L. M.D. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC. DBA PACIFIC BELL TELEPH CO PLAINTIFF PULLED INTO TRAFFIC WITHOUT DETERMINING IF DEFENDANT HAD SEEN PLAINTIFF AND IF DEFENDANT WAS GOING TO YIELD. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SBC COMMUNICATIONS INC. DBA PACIFIC BELL TELEPH CO
